title: Sending reminders only on weekdays
excerpt:
Is there a way to send reminders only on workdays?

posts.author: ryo (Ryosuke Aramaki)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to send reminders only on workdays?
At the moment, I believe that only the following recipes are able to exclude weekends.

  • When status changes to something push due date by some days
  • When item is created, set due date to creation date plus some days
  • When status changes to something, set due date to current date plus some days

I would love to know how everyone is sending reminders only on weekdays.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @ryo - Please add your voice to this request by using the little feedback icon in the top right of the Custom Automation builder. Once we can choose workdays there, most of the issues about notification timing and avoiding weekends will be solved. The more people who request it, the more likely it is to be prioritized.

posts.author: ryo (Ryosuke Aramaki)
posts.cookedHtml:
@PolishedGeek
Thank you for the reply.
I will be sure to send a request.
Do you have any solutions at the moment?
